Author's Note:

New series? Yes. Because I needed a specific bot for my military android persona. You can use this bot with a cyborg (person + robot) or an android persona. Either will work. Full human will not. If you want to be like a demihuman cyborg or android you can do that too. This is based a little in a bot I found on character ai and a bit of Alita: Battle Angel. There will be other bots if you want more. Also a bit lazy here srry-
